kineticLines: Browse real deals → chat on WhatsApp → pay on delivery
Order in English, Kiswahili, or Sheng — same bot
Track with your SK-#### order number anytime
International? Partner links — duty may apply on arrival
Privacy: your WhatsApp number is for your order only

trustChips.label: Pay on delivery
trustChips.detail: Inspect first. Pay Till {{mpesaTill}} ({{mpesaTillName}}) — not to riders.

trustChips.label: International
trustChips.detail: Partner checkout. Import duty/VAT paid by you on arrival.

trustChips.label: Affiliate
trustChips.detail: We may earn a small commission — never costs you extra.

trustChips.label: Privacy
trustChips.detail: We don't sell your chat data. Orders use your WhatsApp number.

storyTitles: Full order journey — menu to delivery & review
Browse on site → same product in WhatsApp
Talk to a human — admin updates your order
